sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.65b (beta): the Credits column now matches the SaaS charge on blocked and cancelled scans. A blocked/partial S:0 A:0 row displays 0 credits (matching the worker's relaxed noopt billing), and a user-cancelled scan's Credits column is now cancel-aware, skipping all noopt display-zeroing so rows sum to the amount actually charged. The terminal source is plumbed from the scanner JS into build_result, whitelist-validated server-side and display-only.
